description_long: This is a closed, square pizza box made of brown cardboard, featuring colorful printed graphics and text on the lid. The top of the box displays the words 'Hot Fresh Pizza' in red and green, along with illustrations of tomatoes and a pizza slice. The box has slightly crumpled and uneven edges, suggesting it has been handled or transported. The sides of the box are also printed with text and small graphics, maintaining the pizza theme. The box appears to be of standard size for a takeout pizza, and no contents are visible inside.
description: A brown cardboard pizza box with colorful graphics and text, slightly crumpled and closed.
description_view_0: Front angled view showing the full lid design with 'Hot Fresh Pizza' text and pizza slice illustration.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the box's thickness and the printed text along the edge.
description_view_2: Rear angled view showing the back edge and more of the crumpled box corners.
description_view_3: Side-rear view with a clear look at the box's side graphics and the uneven lid surface.
